title: phase spec-parser requirements
purpose: C2.1 defines phase spec parser requirements for the agent-driven expert system. Product execution — pipelines, tasks, program, delivery.
scope: Owns `C2.1` only; siblings under `C2` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §5 — Branch C — Product execution plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#5-branch-c-product-execution-plane).
behavior_steps: When [D3.1](D3.1-1-platform-turn-per-k-product-turns.md) schedules a platform turn after K product steps, the conductor dequeues the head of `platform.promotion_queue` without mutating consumer `next_action` or the active implement task.

The conductor spawns economy platform workers—playbook-keeper, script extraction, or catalog regeneration—scoped to the item's `target_level` on the [D1](D1-index.md) ladder while product pursuit state stays frozen for that turn.
One promotion item drains per platform turn unless parallel platform slots are explicitly enabled in policy, preserving an auditable queue mutation trail per dequeue.

After workers finish, the conductor runs [D6](D6-index.md) definition-of-done checks—catalog row, L2+ verify script when applicable, task reference, staleness node—then dual-writes the item done or re-enqueues with updated partial state.

If [D2.2](D2.2-platform-queue-item-schema.md) schema validation fails, [D3.3](D3.3-priority-cut-product-blocked-missing-tool.md) blocks product on missing tooling, or D6 proof is absent, the item remains in-queue and pursuit fails closed at H2 rather than falsely completing promotion.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Edge case `C2.1` variant 3: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Edge case `C2.1` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `C2.1`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Map `C2.1` to v2.14â€“v2.23 release row in SEC-15-index.md.
Create or extend S0 script if behavior is file-derived.
Add unit test under tests/unit/test_c2_1.py when script exists.
Validate `C2.1` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `C2.1` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `C2.1`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: C2.1 defines phase spec parser requirements for the agent-driven expert system. Product execution — pipelines, tasks, program, delivery. In practice, the system when [d3.1](d3.1-1-platform-turn-per-k-product-turns.md) schedules a platform turn after k product steps, the conductor dequeues the head of `platform.promotion_queue` without mutating consumer `next_action` or the active implement task, then the conductor spawns economy platform workers—playbook-keeper, script extraction, or catalog regeneration—scoped to the item's `target_level` on the [d1](d1-index.md) ladder while product pursuit state stays frozen for that turn.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-c 2026-06-28 -->

Spec-parser phase extracts requirements, validates assumptions, lists open questions, and creates or refreshes journal/state via journal-keeper. Blocking questions stop downstream design until answered or deferred with rationale recorded.

Outputs feed hld-writer and program-scoper when mega-spec detected. S0 scripts validate spec structure where templates exist. This phase is the H1 input artifact generator—pursuit should not skip to implement without parsed requirements unless journal says spec phase complete.
